novel_features.name: Send-safety check
novel_features.description: Go/no-go verdict on a list, tag, or contact before any SMS or drip: phone present, Twilio-verified line type, Twilio validity, and DNC status in one table (see imports blame for provider rejections).
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining local contacts, DNC records, and delivery outcomes — no single API call returns the composite verdict.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Run it before acting on any 'text this list' instruction — it is the anti-Kloudi gate.

novel_features.name: Import delivery blame
novel_features.description: For one import job: who got the SMS, who was skipped, and why — grouped by rejection or skip reason.
novel_features.rationale: Joins import rows, contacts, and SMS delivery outcomes in local SQLite; the app shows each piece on a different screen.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Answers 'did the Tuesday import get its texts?' in one call after any bulk push.

novel_features.name: Import watcher
novel_features.description: Polls an import job to completion, then renders the row-outcome recap (created/updated/skipped/errors) and, with --verify, the SMS delivery report.
novel_features.rationale: Chains job polling, preflight warnings, and the delivery report into one cron-safe command.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Drop it into n8n or cron and alert on bad imports instead of discovering them hours later.

novel_features.name: Verification cost estimate
novel_features.description: Counts unverified contacts and prints the tenant-paid Twilio cost before the loop (--estimate), then drives the batched verification to done. Requires the account's Phone Line-Type Verification setting (403 'not enabled' otherwise).
novel_features.rationale: Local pre-count over synced contacts; the API cannot answer it without paging the whole tenant.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Know the dollar exposure before spending it; then run the same command without --estimate to verify.

novel_features.name: Drip ledger audit
novel_features.description: Flags duplicate sends in a window: any contact who received the same message body more than once, from the local store.
novel_features.rationale: Mechanically enforces the at-most-once SMS protocol via a local cross-table join.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Proves a drip cohort fired exactly once per contact — or names the exceptions.

novel_features.name: Local analytics
novel_features.description: GROUP BY over synced entities — segment counts without paging the API (--type/--group-by/--limit).
novel_features.rationale: 200k contacts behind 30-60/min rate limits make API-side aggregation impractical; the local store answers instantly.
novel_features.why_it_matters: The fast path for 'how many contacts are X' questions agents ask constantly.

novel_features.name: Live event follow
novel_features.description: Interval polling over a resource that re-emits current results as JSON — watch messages or activities as a blast goes out.
novel_features.rationale: Incremental polling with cursor state; a one-shot GET cannot stream deltas.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Confirm automation side effects and outbound sends as they happen.

narrative.headline: Full-coverage Conduyt CLI: every endpoint, plus Kloudi-grade send-safety forensics no other surface has.
narrative.value_prop: Full coverage of the Conduyt CRM API with a local SQLite store, offline search, and agent-native output. On top of the mirror: send-check, imports blame, and imports watch — the commands that answer 'is this list safe to text?' and 'who actually got the SMS?' in one call.

quickstart.comment: Verify your cdy_ API key and connectivity first
Pull contacts, deals, and imports into the local store
The anti-Kloudi gate: is this segment safe to message?
What the SMS provider did with your drips, and why

troubleshoots.fix: Your cdy_ key lacks that domain scope — an admin grants it in Settings > API Keys (dnc and dialer require explicit scopes).
Enable Phone Line-Type Verification in Settings > Twilio first (tenant-paid feature, default off).
Run 'sync' once and query the local store (search/sql/analytics) instead of paging the API.

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for this CLI whenever an agent or operator works Conduyt CRM data: contact and deal CRUD, import safety (preflight, watch, blame), SMS delivery forensics, and line-type verification. Prefer the local-store commands (search, sql, analytics, send-check) for read-heavy questions — they avoid rate limits entirely.

recipes.title: Kloudi-safe bulk import
recipes.explanation: Watch an import job to completion, then render the outcome recap and delivery report with typed exit codes (preflight the file first via imports post-preflight --stdin).

recipes.title: Blame a bad blast
recipes.explanation: Group an import's contacts by delivery outcome or skip reason to see exactly where the texts went.

recipes.title: Segment safety audit
recipes.explanation: Bounded agent-shaped go/no-go summary; drill in with --select verdicts.status,verdicts.reason.

trigger_phrases: is this list safe to text
who got the SMS from that import
